- Lock-in, GHO to process all provider claims
E_PTD_PBP_ID_1 - 12 Monthly Medicare Part D Plan Benefit Package Number. January through December 3-digit numeric
Null/missing = Not enrolled in Mediare Part D during the month
E_PTD_CONTRACT_ID_1 - 12 Monthly Medicare Part D Contract Number. January through December 5-digit alpha numeric
N=
Null/missing (or 0) = Not enrolled in Mediare Part D during the month
E_PTD_SNP_1 - 12 Monthly Medicare Part D Special Needs Plan (SNP) Indicator. January
